'''Joshua Jinzler''' was a patron of the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]] when [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] were pursuing the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]]. Jinzler had short, almost white hair and was wearing a reddish vest. He was part of the crowd that approached Zam's crashed [[Koro-2 all-environment exodrive airspeeder|Koro-2 all-environment exodrive]] [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]].<ref name="AOTC" />

==Behind the scenes==
This character may have been [[Tuckerization|named after]] writer/editor [[Jonathan W. Rinzler]].
